overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence in Cyberpunk 2077, walking along a neon-lit elevated pathway toward a luxury penthouse during a stormy dusk. The camera enters the futuristic building and explores the spacious interior with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the neon-lit Night City skyline.

events.description: passing an outdoor fire pit burning on the left side of the pathway

circular metal fire bowl with active flames burning beside the pathway

segments.scene_description: Walking along a futuristic elevated pathway illuminated by purple neon strips embedded in the pavement. The route is lined with palm trees and concrete walls, leading toward a luxury penthouse building. An outdoor fire pit burns on the left as the path curves, with the Night City skyline visible in the distance against a stormy dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury building entrance plaza with marble paving

events.description: approaching and passing through the automatic sliding entrance doors into the building

agents.ego_description: approaching the building entrance and passing through the large automatic sliding doors

entered.detail: expansive outdoor marble-tiled plaza surrounding the building entrance
large dark sliding doors with illuminated frames that open automatically

segments.scene_description: The pathway opens into a marble plaza surrounding the luxury penthouse. The camera approaches the large entrance doors which slide open to reveal the interior, transitioning from the stormy exterior to the sheltered entrance hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury penthouse entrance hall with grand staircase

events.description: noticing scattered debris and discarded bottles across the marble floor indicating recent disarray

polished gray marble tiles covering the entrance hall floor
reflective pool or water installation near the entrance area
discarded bottles, cans, and trash littering the otherwise pristine floor

segments.scene_description: Inside the luxurious penthouse, the camera moves across marble floors past a grand staircase and indoor water features. The space shows signs of disarray with bottles and debris scattered about, suggesting a recent gathering or conflict. The interior features modern furniture and dramatic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury penthouse dining area with panoramic city views

events.description: approaching the floor-to-ceiling windows to observe the Night City skyline and neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking toward the large windows to view the illuminated cityscape, examining the dining area and scattered items

entered.detail: massive glass walls offering unobstructed views of the cityscape
bright holographic billboards and neon signs on distant buildings including yellow and red signage
long sleek dining table with debris and bottles scattered on its surface

segments.scene_description: The camera explores the dining area featuring a long modern table cluttered with debris and bottles. Floor-to-ceiling windows reveal a stunning view of the Night City skyline with towering buildings and bright neon advertisements against the stormy dusk sky. The space transitions from marble to wooden flooring as it approaches the panoramic windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit outdoor promenade into the decadent, disarrayed interior of a luxury penthouse. It begins by gliding along an elevated pathway illuminated by purple neon strips and lined with palm trees, passing a burning fire pit as the route curves toward a distant skyline under a stormy dusk sky. As the path opens into a marble plaza, the camera approaches the penthouse entrance and moves through sliding doors, transitioning from the wind-swept exterior into a sheltered, opulent hall. The scene then shifts across marble floors past a grand staircase and indoor water features, where the luxury is contrasted by scattered bottles and debris. Finally, the camera moves from marble to wooden flooring through a cluttered dining area before arriving at floor-to-ceiling windows that reveal a panoramic view of the towering neon advertisements of Night City.
